all.en: For the past three years, Kai-wen and his wife have been saving for an apartment.
all.zh: 過去三年來，凱文和他的妻子一直在為買公寓存錢。

all.en: They dream of owning a small two-bedroom place near the park.
all.zh: 他們夢想能擁有一間靠近公園的小型兩房公寓。

all.en: Every month, they transfer a fixed amount into a special savings account.
all.zh: 每個月他們都會把固定金額轉入一個專門的儲蓄帳戶。

all.en: They rarely eat out, and they always cook simple meals at home together.
all.zh: 他們很少外出用餐，總是一起在家煮簡單的飯菜。

all.en: Vacations have been replaced with short weekend trips to nearby mountains.
all.zh: 度假被改成到附近山區的短週末旅行所取代。

all.en: His wife sold her old jewelry, and Kai-wen picked up freelance projects on weekends.
all.zh: 他的妻子賣掉舊首飾，凱文也在週末接接案工作。

all.en: Their parents offered to help, but the couple wanted to do it on their own.
all.zh: 他們的父母提議要幫忙，但這對夫妻想自己完成。

all.en: Last week, they finally reached their target down payment of one million dollars.
all.zh: 上週，他們終於達到了一百萬元的頭期款目標。

all.en: They visited the bank to discuss the mortgage and the next steps.
all.zh: 他們前往銀行討論房貸和接下來的步驟。

all.en: The loan officer praised their financial discipline and steady saving habits.
all.zh: 貸款專員稱讚他們的財務紀律和穩定的儲蓄習慣。

all.en: Standing outside their future home, they felt that every sacrifice had been worth it.
all.zh: 站在他們未來的家門外，他們覺得每一次犧牲都是值得的。
